markers.name: Battle: Rival 1
markers.description: First rival encounter; streamer says 'let's take on rival number one and just see how this actually goes' and leads off vs Chikorita with Staryu.

markers.name: Battle: Honest Abe
markers.description: First named overworld trainer fight inside Faulkner's Gym; streamer narrates 'against Honest Abe, he's going to lead off with this level nine Spearow'.

markers.name: Battle: Falkner
markers.description: Violet City Gym Leader (Johto Gym 1); 'here against Faulkner, of course, he's going to send out his first precious bird, this Pidgey'.

markers.name: Battle: Jamesy Proton
markers.description: Team Rocket executive Proton in the Slowpoke Well; streamer announces 'Jamesy Proton attempt number one, I figure I'll just lead off with an X-Defend here'.

markers.name: Battle: Bugsy
markers.description: Azalea Gym Leader (Johto Gym 2); 'Bugsy attempt number one, of course, he leads off with the Metapod'.

markers.name: Battle: Rival 2
markers.description: Second rival fight with Gastly/Bayleaf/Zubat at Burned Tower area; 'rival to attempt number one misty's smart ai would tell her to only use water gun against ghastly'.

markers.name: Battle: Whitney
markers.description: Goldenrod Gym Leader (Johto Gym 3); 'Whitney leads off with her level 18 Clefairy to go up against our level 18 Staryu'.

markers.name: Battle: Rival 3
markers.description: Third rival fight with Haunter/Magnemite/Bayleaf/Zubat; 'Rival 3 attempt number one, he leads off with the Haunter, which yet again, because it is a ghost type, Misty would never use Tackle'.
